mapper.sql: r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.cook_time AS cookTime, COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = r.recipe_id), 0) AS avgRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = r.recipe_id) AS reviewCount, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM wishlist w WHERE w.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND w.member_id = #{viewerId}) AS isWishlisted, r.source

where.if: AND ( r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recipe_ingredient ri WHERE ri.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND ri.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) )
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recipe_ingredient ri2 WHERE ri2.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND ri2.name IN #{ing})
AND r.cook_time IS NOT NULL AND r.cook_time >= #{minCookTime}
AND r.cook_time IS NOT NULL AND r.cook_time <= #{maxCookTime}

mapper.select: SELECT FROM recipe r WHERE r.is_public = TRUE ORDER BY r.view_count DESC, r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, title FROM recipe WHERE is_public = TRUE AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY (title LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')) DESC, view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title, r.summary, r.image_url AS thumbnailUrl, r.cook_time AS cookTime, r.calories, r.carbs, r.protein, r.fat, r.sodium, COALESCE((SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = r.recipe_id), 0) AS avgRating, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE recipe_id = r.recipe_id) AS reviewCount, EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM wishlist w WHERE w.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND w.member_id = #{viewerId}) AS isWishlisted FROM recipe r WHERE r.recipe_id = #{recipeId} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.recipeId, t.name FROM ( SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, name, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY recipe_id ORDER BY ingredient_id) AS rn FROM recipe_ingredient WHERE recipe_id IN #{id} ) t WHERE t.rn <= 3 ORDER BY t.recipeId, t.rn

SELECT r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title, r.summary, r.cook_time AS cookTime, COUNT(ri.ingredient_id) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN ri.name IN #{nm} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS matched, SUM(CASE WHEN ri.name NOT IN #{nm} AND ri.name NOT IN #{st} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS buyNeeded FROM recipe r JOIN recipe_ingredient ri ON ri.recipe_id = r.recipe_id WHERE r.is_public = TRUE AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM recipe_step s WHERE s.recipe_id = r.recipe_id) GROUP BY r.recipe_id, r.title, r.summary, r.cook_time HAVING matched >= #{minMatch} AND buyNeeded <= #{maxBuy} ORDER BY buyNeeded ASC, matched DESC, (matched / total) DESC, r.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT name, qty FROM recipe_ingredient WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY ingredient_id
SELECT step_number AS stepNumber, description, image_url AS imageUrl FROM recipe_step WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_number
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.select: SELECT ai_recipe_id AS aiRecipeId, member_id AS memberId, title, summary, ingredients_json AS ingredientsJson, steps_json AS stepsJson, cook_time AS cookTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM ai_recipe WHERE ai_recipe_id = #{aiRecipeId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe (title, summary, cook_time, source, author_id, is_public, source_ai_recipe_id) VALUES (#{cmd.title}, #{cmd.summary}, #{cmd.cookTime}, 'AI_SAVED', #{cmd.authorId}, FALSE, #{cmd.sourceAiRecipeId})

INSERT INTO recipe_ingredient (recipe_id, name, qty) VALUES
(#{recipeId}, #{ing.name}, #{ing.qty})

INSERT INTO recipe_step (recipe_id, step_number, description) VALUES
(#{recipeId}, #{s.stepNumber}, #{s.description})
mapper.select: SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, author_id AS authorId, is_public AS isPublic FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE recipe SET is_public = TRUE WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.select: SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, title, cook_time AS cookTime, is_public AS isPublic, source, created_at AS createdAt FROM recipe WHERE author_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
